languages.text: {n}То, что раньше казалось нагромождением деталей рядом с пленником, внезапно приходит в движение. Сервитор-толкователь, чудом уцелевший среди вечных льдов, начинает со скрежетом превращать потусторонние звуки в слова низкого готика.{/n} "Ничтожных... прибыло втрое... против былого".

{n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."
languages.original_text: {n}То, что раньше казалось нагромождением деталей рядом с пленником, внезапно приходит в движение. Сервитор-толкователь, чудом уцелевший среди вечных льдов, начинает со скрежетом превращать потусторонние звуки в слова низкого готика.{/n} "Ничтожных... прибыло втрое... против былого".

traits.locale_text: {n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

{n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

{n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

languages.text: {n}囚犯身旁那堆原本看似杂乱的部件突然运转起来。在永恒冰封中奇迹般幸存下来的阐释器机仆嘎吱作响，将异界声响翻译为低哥特语：{/n}“如今前来的……卑贱者……是先前的三倍。”
languages.original_text: {n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}囚犯身旁那堆原本看似杂乱的部件突然运转起来。在永恒冰封中奇迹般幸存下来的阐释器机仆嘎吱作响，将异界声响翻译为低哥特语：{/n}“如今前来的……卑贱者……是先前的三倍。”

languages.text: {n}Junto al prisionero, empieza a moverse algo que habías tomado por una maraña de piezas. El servidor dilucidador, que de alguna forma ha sobrevivido al hielo perpetuo, traduce a duras penas los sonidos sobrenaturales al Bajo Gótico:{/n} «Se me aproxima... el triple de indignos... que la última vez».
languages.original_text: {n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}Junto al prisionero, empieza a moverse algo que habías tomado por una maraña de piezas. El servidor dilucidador, que de alguna forma ha sobrevivido al hielo perpetuo, traduce a duras penas los sonidos sobrenaturales al Bajo Gótico:{/n} «Se me aproxima... el triple de indignos... que la última vez».

languages.text: {n}Soudain, ce qui n'était jusque-là qu'un amas incongru de pièces détachées s'anime à côté du prisonnier. Ayant miraculeusement survécu à la glace éternelle, le servitor élucidateur se met dans un grincement à traduire les sons mystérieux en bas gothique :{/n} « Aujourd'hui, trois fois plus... de créatures inférieures... s'avancent. »
languages.original_text: {n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}Soudain, ce qui n'était jusque-là qu'un amas incongru de pièces détachées s'anime à côté du prisonnier. Ayant miraculeusement survécu à la glace éternelle, le servitor élucidateur se met dans un grincement à traduire les sons mystérieux en bas gothique :{/n} « Aujourd'hui, trois fois plus... de créatures inférieures... s'avancent. »

languages.text: {n}Mahkûmun yanında sadece bir parça yığını gibi görünen şey, aniden harekete geçiyor. Sonsuz buzun ortasında mucizevi bir şekilde hayatta kalan Aydınlatıcı hizmetör, gıcırdayarak uhrevi sesleri Adi Gotik diline çevirmeye başlıyor.{/n} "Şimdi eskisinden... Üç kat daha... Adi."
languages.original_text: {n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mahkûmun yanında sadece bir parça yığını gibi görünen şey, aniden harekete geçiyor. Sonsuz buzun ortasında mucizevi bir şekilde hayatta kalan Aydınlatıcı hizmetör, gıcırdayarak uhrevi sesleri Adi Gotik diline çevirmeye başlıyor.{/n} "Şimdi eskisinden... Üç kat daha... Adi."

languages.text: {n}Das scheinbare Gewirr von Teilen neben dem Gefangenen erwacht plötzlich zum Leben. Der Elucidator-Servitor, der im ewigen Eis wie durch ein Wunder überlebt hat, fängt an, die außerweltlichen Geräusche ins Niedergotische zu übersetzen:{/n} "Jetzt kommen ... dreimal so viele Niedere ... wie zuvor."
languages.original_text: {n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

traits.locale_text: {n}Das scheinbare Gewirr von Teilen neben dem Gefangenen erwacht plötzlich zum Leben. Der Elucidator-Servitor, der im ewigen Eis wie durch ein Wunder überlebt hat, fängt an, die außerweltlichen Geräusche ins Niedergotische zu übersetzen:{/n} "Jetzt kommen ... dreimal so viele Niedere ... wie zuvor."

languages.text: {n}囚人となっていた男の隣に、ただの部品の寄せ集めのように見えたものが、突然動き出す。永遠の氷の中で奇跡的に生き延びたエルシデーターのサーヴァントが、異世界の音をローゴシック語に訳し始める。{/n}「今や三倍の...卑しい者たちが...来た。」
languages.original_text: {n}What appeared to be merely a jumble of parts next to the prisoner suddenly stirs into motion. The Elucidator servitor, miraculously surviving amidst the perpetual ice, creakingly begins to translate the otherworldly sounds into Low Gothic:{/n} "Now thrice as many... lowly have come... as before."

traits.locale_text: 囚人となっていた男の隣に、ただの部品の寄せ集めのように見えたものが、突然動き出す。永遠の氷の中で奇跡的に生き延びたエルシデーターのサーヴァントが、異世界の音をローゴシック語に訳し始める。{n}「今や三倍の...卑しい者たちが...来た。」
